current_iteration.baseline_audit_status: Uploaded v0.23.0 baseline inspected; continuity errors reconciled in v0.23.1 authorities and release metadata.
current_iteration.approval_evidence: User asked ZEKE to work on the enumerated improvements now and then supplied the requested authoritative v0.23.0 source ZIP.
approved_scope: Make sleep confirmation atomic and save confirmed sleep to structured history
Add direct sleep logging from the Health Library Sleep tile
Replace abstract Review Questions with original input, concrete proposal, uncertainty, and explicit actions
Repair health trend labels, suppress display duplicates, and add duplicate protections for new entries
Recompose the Dashboard as independent vertical stacks to eliminate cross-row whitespace
Make Coach’s Eye and insight content concrete, user-friendly, evidence-linked, and actionable
Make Activity Library graph eligibility and metric labels consistent and explain missing graphs
Expose the same optional RPE, pain, technique, notes, and injury-context fields during workout creation and editing
Use one authoritative exercise recommendation across Fitness surfaces
Move Labs into Health and Pattern Lab under Insights in primary navigation
Add durable Potential Health Events and include them in AI relationship-analysis context
Add health-related calendar follow-up prompts only when downstream record use is defined
Add regression tests and synchronize the full continuity package
explicitly_excluded: Global activity rename, merge, or legacy taxonomy migration beyond existing approved behavior
New paid AI services or provider changes
Changes to user storage ownership or canonical-storage architecture
Automatic clinical conclusions, diagnoses, or treatment recommendations
Deletion of historical source data without explicit user action
acceptance_criteria: A typed yes to a pending sleep confirmation saves exactly once and does not become a new parsed record
Sleep can be logged from the Sleep tile and appears in Recent Health Record immediately
Review screens show the actual source and proposed record before any action
Trend labels describe change rather than falsely claiming reference-range status
Activity graphs either render with a named metric or explain why they cannot
Workout create and edit forms expose equivalent optional fields
Sidebar has one Insights destination; Labs is a Health tab and Pattern Lab is an Insights subview
Potential Health Events are durable and included in AI analysis context
All syntax, structural, governance, regression, packaging, and reopened-ZIP checks pass or are precisely reported
current_iteration.rollback_plan: Restore the uploaded v0.23.0 package. No migration is required; new fields are additive and readers remain backward-compatible.
